NodeName.description: Custom node name for cluster identification (defaults to hostname if not set)

MaxPublishRate.description: Maximum messages per second a client can publish (0 = unlimited)

MaxSubscribeRate.description: Maximum messages per second a client can receive (0 = unlimited)

DefaultStoreType.description: Default database backend for all store types unless overridden individually.

QueueStoreType.description: Queue store backend. Defaults to matching SessionStoreType if not set.

QueueVisibilityTimeoutSeconds.description: Visibility timeout for V2 queue stores (seconds). Messages not ACKed within this time become visible again.

AllowRootWildcardSubscription.description: Allow clients to subscribe to '#' (root wildcard). If false, SUBSCRIBE acknowledgements for '#' return failure (0x80) and the client remains connected.

Enabled.description: Enable user authentication and ACL. When false, all clients have unrestricted access.

StoreType.description: Storage backend for user data. Defaults to the broker's DefaultStoreType.

CacheRefreshInterval.description: How often (in seconds) to reload user and ACL data from the store.

DisconnectOnUnauthorized.description: Disconnect clients when their authentication becomes invalid (e.g. user disabled or password changed).

AclCheckOnSubscription.description: When true (default), ACL is checked at subscribe time against the topic filter. Wildcard subscriptions are rejected unless an ACL rule explicitly covers the filter. When false (Mosquitto-compatible), wildcard subscriptions are accepted and ACL is checked at delivery time per message — clients only receive topics their ACL rules allow.

SSL.description: SSL/TLS configuration for secure MQTT connections (TCPS and WSS)

KeyStorePath.description: Path to the Java keystore file (.jks) containing the server certificate

KeyStoreType.description: Keystore format. JKS (Java KeyStore, default) or PKCS12/PFX/P12 (universal format).

MqttTcpServer.description: MQTT TCP server socket configuration for performance tuning

MaxMessageSizeKb.description: Maximum MQTT message size in kilobytes. Messages exceeding this limit are rejected.

NoDelay.description: TCP_NODELAY - disable Nagle's algorithm for immediate packet transmission. Essential for low-latency MQTT and preventing packet corruption under high message rates.

ReceiveBufferSizeKb.description: Socket receive buffer size in kilobytes. Larger buffers handle burst traffic better. Recommended: 512KB for normal load, 1-2MB for high-load scenarios (1000+ msg/sec).

SendBufferSizeKb.description: Socket send buffer size in kilobytes. Should match receive buffer size. Recommended: 512KB for normal load, 1-2MB for high-load scenarios.

Enabled.description: Enable in-memory storage of system logs

Entries.description: Maximum number of log entries to store in memory (circular buffer)

ConfigStoreType.description: Database type for storing archive configuration.

Postgres.description: PostgreSQL database configuration. Supports all store types (sessions, retained messages, archives, metrics, users).

Schema.description: PostgreSQL schema name for storing all MonsterMQ objects. Optional - automatically created if not exists, defaults to 'public' if not specified. Useful for multi-tenant deployments and environment isolation.

ReadTimeoutMs.description: Socket read timeout in milliseconds for MongoDB operations (default: 60000)

EnableWAL.description: Enable WAL (Write-Ahead Logging) mode for better performance. Set to false for easier multi-client access.

RestApi.description: REST API for publish, read, and subscribe. Hosted on the same HTTP server as GraphQL. Provides endpoints under /api/v1/ for publishing messages, reading last values/retained/history, bulk write, and SSE-based subscriptions. Swagger UI available at /api/v1/docs.

Enabled.description: Enable REST API endpoints on the GraphQL HTTP server
Enable MCP server for AI integration

Port.description: Port for MCP server HTTP endpoint

Prometheus.description: Prometheus-compatible metrics server. Exposes broker metrics and topic values in Prometheus text format (/metrics) and implements a subset of the Prometheus HTTP API (/api/v1/query_range, etc.) for Grafana integration.

RawQueryLimit.description: Maximum number of raw records returned for sub-minute step queries (step < 60s). Does not apply to aggregated queries (step >= 60s), which use getAggregatedHistory with no row limit.

I3x.description: CESMII I3X (Industrial Information Interoperability eXchange) REST API server. Exposes MQTT topics, current values, historical data and publish capabilities through the standardized I3X manufacturing API.

Port.description: Port for I3X API HTTP endpoint

Oa4jBridge.description: Native WinCC OA bridge configuration. Allows MQTT clients to interact with WinCC OA via !OA/<namespace>/<operation>/<name> topics. Operations: dps (dpConnect), dpt (dpTypeGet), sql (SQL query). Requires MonsterMQ to run as a WinCC OA manager (MonsterOA entry point).

Namespace.description: Namespace identifier for this WinCC OA system (e.g., 's1'). MQTT clients use !OA/<namespace>/<operation>/<name> topics.

Attributes.description: List of WinCC OA attributes to connect. Each attribute will be included in the JSON output with its config name as key (e.g., '_online.._value' becomes 'value' in JSON).

Dashboard.description: Web dashboard configuration (served from the GraphQL HTTP port)

Path.description: Filesystem path to dashboard files (for development). Leave empty to serve from classpath.

GenAI.description: Generative AI configuration for assistant (script editor, topic analysis) and agent API keys

Enabled.description: Enable GenAI integration for AI-supported features

Assistant.description: Configuration for the internal AI assistant (script editor, topic analysis). Uses LangChain4j.

Temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0.0 to 2.0, higher = more creative)

DocsPath.description: Path to documentation directory containing markdown files for context

Provider.description: (Deprecated: use Assistant.Provider) AI provider to use

Model.description: (Deprecated: use Assistant.Model) Model name to use

MaxTokens.description: (Deprecated) Maximum number of tokens in the response

DocsPath.description: (Deprecated: use Assistant.DocsPath) Path to documentation directory

Providers.description: Per-provider API keys (shared by Assistant and Agents)

TimeoutSeconds.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds for Ollama requests (default: no timeout)

Features.description: Enable or disable optional broker features. All features are enabled by default; set a feature to false to disable it.
